EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed to rename file or directory {object.name} from datastore "{datafield2}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} uploaded file {object.name} to datastore "{object.storage.id}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Failed to remove file or directory {object.name} from datastore "{object.storage.id}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to download file {object.name} from datastore "{object.storage.id}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
File or directory {object.name} is removed from datastore "{object.storage.id}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
File or directory {object.name} from datastore "{datafield2}" is renamed on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
File or directory {object.name} from datastore "{datafield2}" is moved on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Failed to copy file or directory {object.name} from datastore "{datafield2}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Failed to move file or directory {object.name} from datastore "{datafield2}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} downloaded file {object.name} from datastore "{object.storage.id}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to upload file {object.name} to datastore "{object.storage.id}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
File or directory {object.name} from datastore "{datafield2}" is copied on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
